metadata.description: Curated resources for production LLM engineering: model selection, adaptation (prompting/RAG/fine-tuning), evaluation, deployment, and operations.

foundational_papers_and_standards.name: Attention Is All You Need (Transformer)
foundational_papers_and_standards.relevance: Foundational transformer architecture that underpins modern LLMs.

foundational_papers_and_standards.name: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation
foundational_papers_and_standards.relevance: Core reference for adapter-based fine-tuning used widely in production (LoRA/PEFT).

foundational_papers_and_standards.name: QLoRA
foundational_papers_and_standards.relevance: Quantized fine-tuning approach; useful for cost-aware adaptation strategies.

foundational_papers_and_standards.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0
foundational_papers_and_standards.relevance: Governance and risk management baseline for production AI systems.

foundational_papers_and_standards.name: NIST Generative AI Profile (NIST AI 600-1)
foundational_papers_and_standards.relevance: Risk management profile for GenAI systems aligned to the NIST AI RMF.

foundational_papers_and_standards.name: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689)
foundational_papers_and_standards.relevance: Regulatory baseline for risk classification, transparency, and controls for AI systems in the EU.

foundational_papers_and_standards.name: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
foundational_papers_and_standards.relevance: Threat categories and mitigations for LLM-integrated applications.

foundational_papers_and_standards.name: OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for GenAI
foundational_papers_and_standards.relevance: Standardized telemetry for LLM requests (tokens, latency, model attributes).

llm_platforms.name: OpenAI Platform Documentation
llm_platforms.relevance: Official API, models, fine-tuning, embeddings, and endpoint usage.

llm_platforms.name: Anthropic Claude Documentation
llm_platforms.relevance: Claude model API, safety, prompt engineering, agent SDK.

llm_platforms.name: Google Gemini AI Documentation
llm_platforms.relevance: Gemini model API, multimodal, and deployment reference.

llm_platforms.name: Mistral AI Documentation
llm_platforms.relevance: Open and commercial Mistral models, API endpoints.

llm_platforms.name: Azure OpenAI Service
llm_platforms.relevance: Enterprise OpenAI deployment, security, quota management.

open_source_models_and_frameworks.name: Hugging Face Transformers
open_source_models_and_frameworks.relevance: NLP model library, training, fine-tuning, inference recipes.

open_source_models_and_frameworks.name: vLLM
open_source_models_and_frameworks.relevance: High-throughput LLM serving and inference engine.

open_source_models_and_frameworks.name: PEFT (Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning)
open_source_models_and_frameworks.relevance: LoRA, QLoRA, adapters for efficient LLM fine-tuning.

prompt_engineering.name: ReAct Pattern Paper
prompt_engineering.relevance: Describes the ReAct agent prompting technique.

rag_and_vector_databases.name: LlamaIndex Documentation
rag_and_vector_databases.relevance: Data connectors, RAG patterns, index config, eval, multi-agent support.

rag_and_vector_databases.name: LangGraph Documentation
rag_and_vector_databases.relevance: Stateful multi-agent workflows, graph-based orchestration (2025 standard for complex agents).

rag_and_vector_databases.name: Microsoft GraphRAG
rag_and_vector_databases.relevance: Knowledge graph-based RAG for structured, deterministic retrieval (2025 trend).

rag_and_vector_databases.name: Pathway RAG Framework
rag_and_vector_databases.relevance: Real-time data processing, end-to-end RAG with streaming ETL.

rag_and_vector_databases.name: Haystack
rag_and_vector_databases.relevance: End-to-end framework for RAG and eval.

rag_and_vector_databases.name: Pinecone
rag_and_vector_databases.relevance: Managed vector DB for high-scale retrieval.

rag_and_vector_databases.name: Qdrant
rag_and_vector_databases.relevance: Open-source vector DB for AI/RAG systems.

rag_and_vector_databases.name: Chroma
rag_and_vector_databases.relevance: Open-source embedding database for local RAG.

evaluation_and_monitoring.name: OpenAI Evals
evaluation_and_monitoring.relevance: Framework for LLM evaluation and regression testing.

evaluation_and_monitoring.name: Anthropic Evals
evaluation_and_monitoring.relevance: Official eval metrics for Claude and agentic systems.

evaluation_and_monitoring.name: LangSmith
evaluation_and_monitoring.relevance: Observability and evaluation for LLM pipelines.

evaluation_and_monitoring.name: Arize AI Phoenix
evaluation_and_monitoring.relevance: LLM observability, evaluation, tracing for production systems.

agentic_frameworks_2025.name: Anthropic Agent SDK
agentic_frameworks_2025.relevance: Official SDK for building Claude-powered agents with tool use and memory.

agentic_frameworks_2025.name: CrewAI
agentic_frameworks_2025.relevance: Role-based multi-agent orchestration with hierarchical workflows.

agentic_frameworks_2025.name: LangGraph Multi-Agent Guide
agentic_frameworks_2025.relevance: Graph-based multi-agent systems with stateful workflows.

agentic_frameworks_2025.name: Semantic Kernel
agentic_frameworks_2025.relevance: Microsoft's orchestration SDK for AI agents and plugins.

production_deployment.name: LiteLLM
production_deployment.relevance: Unified API for 100+ LLM providers, load balancing, cost tracking.

production_deployment.name: Ollama
production_deployment.relevance: Local LLM deployment with GGUF quantization support.

production_deployment.name: RunPod
production_deployment.relevance: GPU cloud for LLM inference with auto-scaling.

production_deployment.name: Together AI
production_deployment.relevance: Fast inference for open-source models, fine-tuning support.

production_deployment.name: SGLang
production_deployment.relevance: High-performance inference with RadixAttention for KV-cache reuse in agents/RAG (29% faster than vLLM on structured workloads).

production_deployment.name: FlashInfer
production_deployment.relevance: Kernel library for custom LLM inference optimization, used by SGLang and vLLM.

production_deployment.name: LMDeploy
production_deployment.relevance: Inference framework with throughput comparable to SGLang, simpler setup than TensorRT-LLM.

books.name: Designing Data-Intensive Applications (Martin Kleppmann)
books.relevance: Replication, sharding, backpressure, and consistency for search/RAG infra and data planes.

books.name: AI Engineering (Chip Huyen)
books.relevance: Lifecycle for AI apps, evaluation/feedback loops, cost/latency optimization, and deployment patterns.

books.name: Building LLMs for Production (Louis-François Bouchard)
books.relevance: Applied RAG/agent workflows, evaluation, LangChain/LlamaIndex patterns, deployment checklists.

books.name: LLM Engineer’s Handbook (Paul Iusztin, Maxime Labonne)
books.relevance: FTI pipeline architecture, registries, cloud/RAG/agent templates for production LLMs.

books.name: Building Agentic AI Systems (Anjanava Biswas)
books.relevance: Agent design patterns, coordinator/worker/delegator flows, trust and human-in-loop safeguards.

research_tools.name: DSPy
research_tools.purpose: Research framework for LLM prompt pipelines, dynamic prompting, and eval.
research_tools.use_case: When exploring novel LLM or RAG pipelines.

research_tools.name: TRL (Transformer Reinforcement Learning)
research_tools.purpose: RLHF and PPO for LLM training/fine-tuning.
research_tools.use_case: When training LLMs with reinforcement learning or reward modeling.

communities.name: Hugging Face Forums
communities.focus: LLM development, fine-tuning, eval, datasets, troubleshooting

communities.name: Anthropic Community
communities.focus: Claude, prompt design, safety, agentic workflows
